channel.title: AI Thought Leader Talks (YouTube)
channel.description: Original long-form talks and interviews with AI thought leaders, filtered by Claude.

item.title: [Demis Hassabis] Demis Hassabis (Google DeepMind) — Su Teoría de la Mente 🪿
item.author: amVizion
item.description:
amVizion · 98 min

Demis Hassabis, Google DeepMind CEO, discusses theory of mind in the context of AI research.

item.title: [Yann LeCun] Yann LeCun on Why Open Source AI Is the Only Path to Sovereignty | AI Alliance Fireside Chat
item.author: The AI Alliance
item.description:
The AI Alliance · 28 min

Yann LeCun, Chief AI Scientist at Meta, speaks at the AI Alliance Fireside Chat on why open source AI is essential for technological sovereignty.

item.title: [Andrej Karpathy] Andrej Karpathy on Code Agents, AutoResearch, and the Loopy Era of AI
item.author: No Priors: AI, Machine Learning, Tech, & Startups
item.description:
No Priors: AI, Machine Learning, Tech, & Startups · 67 min

Andrej Karpathy discusses code agents, AutoResearch, and his concept of the 'loopy era' of AI development.

item.title: [Jensen Huang] Jensen Huang: Nvidia's Future, Physical AI, Rise of the Agent, Inference Explosion, AI PR Crisis
item.author: All-In Podcast
item.description:
All-In Podcast · 66 min

Jensen Huang joins the All-In Podcast to discuss Nvidia's future direction, Physical AI, the rise of AI agents, inference scaling, and AI PR challenges.

item.title: [Jensen Huang] NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang GTC 2026 Full Keynote
item.author: Yahoo Finance
item.description:
Yahoo Finance · 140 min

Full replay of NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang's GTC 2026 keynote, covering the company's latest AI hardware announcements, GPU roadmap, and vision for AI computing.

item.title: [Jensen Huang] Morgan Stanley TMT Conference 2026 | Jensen Huang on AI, Compute, Tokens and the New Global Economy
item.author: Morgan Stanley
item.description:
Morgan Stanley · 43 min

Jensen Huang speaks at the Morgan Stanley TMT Conference 2026 on AI, compute, tokens, and the new global economy driven by AI infrastructure.

item.title: [Jensen Huang] LIVE: MASSIVE Nvidia Announcements (full Jensen Huang GTC Keynote)
item.author: Alex Finn
item.description:
Alex Finn · 156 min

Live full broadcast of Jensen Huang's GTC 2026 keynote with all major Nvidia announcements, including next-generation AI chips and robotics initiatives.

item.title: [Org: Anthropic Talks] Anthropic’s Claude Cowork Might Be the Closest Thing to AGI Yet — Felix Rieseberg of Anthropic
item.author: Latent Space
item.description:
Latent Space · 88 min

Felix Rieseberg of Anthropic joins Latent Space to discuss Claude Cowork, Anthropic's approach to AI-powered coding environments, and why it may be the closest thing to AGI yet.

item.title: [Org: OpenAI Talks] Building AI for better healthcare — the OpenAI Podcast Ep. 14
item.author: OpenAI
item.description:
OpenAI · 31 min

OpenAI Podcast Episode 14: OpenAI researchers discuss building AI systems specifically designed to improve healthcare outcomes, including diagnostics and treatment optimization.

item.title: [Org: Google DeepMind Talks] Navigating the Future of AI with Logan Kilpatrick | Google Deepmind
item.author: Rishab in Cloud
item.description:
Rishab in Cloud · 45 min

Logan Kilpatrick of Google DeepMind discusses the future trajectory of AI, the role of large language models, and the next frontiers in AI research.

item.title: [Channel: Dwarkesh Patel] Terence Tao – AI is still brute force but it will revolutionize experimental math
item.author: Dwarkesh Patel
item.description:
Dwarkesh Patel · 84 min

Terence Tao discusses how current AI still relies heavily on brute-force computation, but argues it will nonetheless revolutionize experimental mathematics by enabling entirely new forms of mathematical discovery. The episode opens with Kepler's laws of planetary motion as a historical example of surprising mathematical patterns emerging from data.

item.title: [Channel: Y Combinator] How AI Is Unlocking Millions Of New Builders
item.author: Y Combinator
item.description:
Y Combinator · 40 min

Mukund and Madhav Jha, founders of Emergent, explain how their AI platform enables anyone to build and deploy production-ready software in a short timeframe, dramatically lowering the barrier to software creation.

item.title: [Channel: Zhang Xiaojun Podcast] 133. 对谢赛宁的7小时马拉松访谈：世界模型、逃出硅谷、AMI Labs、两次拒绝Ilya、杨立昆、李飞飞和42
item.author: Zhang Xiaojun Podcast
item.description:
Zhang Xiaojun Podcast · 406 min

7小时马拉松访谈。2026年春节，纽约经历了一场暴雪。谢赛宁（Xie Sain）与张晓钧展开深度对话，涵盖世界模型（World Models）、AMI Labs、逃离硅谷的经历、两次拒绝Ilya Sutskever的邀请、与杨立昆和李飞飞的渊源与42的意义。
